title: Supplier delivery risk mitigation decision
summary: Supplier delivery risk mitigation decision generated from 1 Enterprise Verified Fact: Supplier X delivery is at risk within 36 hours.
recommended_action: Review supplier mitigation options and approve an operational response before the delivery risk materializes.

business_impact.operational: Operational exposure is high for supplier_risk_mitigation.
business_impact.compliance: No direct compliance action identified by RTS-1E.
business_impact.customer: Customer delivery or service reliability may be affected.
business_impact.time: Candidate expires unless reviewed within the configured TTL.

constraints: Candidate must be submitted before expiration.
Only AG-2 may perform governance routing.
decision_rationale: EVF evf-d42f06c2 supports candidate generation: Supplier X delivery is at risk within 36 hours.
All supporting EVFs are VERIFIED or ACTIVE.
Generation policy STANDARD thresholds were satisfied.
No blocking contradictions were present.
Candidate is deterministic and contains complete lineage.

alternative_options.description: Escalate supplier delivery risk for manual review
alternative_options.expected_impact: Improves oversight but may defer operational benefit.

alternative_options.description: Monitor supplier delivery risk until the next verified fact refresh
disadvantages: Risk may increase during the waiting period
alternative_options.expected_impact: Reduces immediate workload but increases time sensitivity.
No mitigation occurs; risk remains dependent on external change.

recommended_option.description: Mitigate supplier delivery risk using the governed recommended action.
advantages: Can be routed to AG-2 when ready
recommended_option.expected_impact: Reduces supplier delivery risk exposure while preserving governance evidence.

expected_outcomes: Supplier delivery risk is reduced or escalated with accountable owner.
Decision lineage is ready for AG-2 governance.
